description: 先週の変更ファイル問い合わせ

entries.content: Refactored authentication middleware in auth/middleware.ts. Replaced JWT validation with session-based check. Added rate limiting per user.
Updated database schema: added users.last_login column and session_tokens table. Ran migration successfully.
Fixed bug in payment processing where duplicate charges occurred on retry. Added idempotency key to Stripe API calls.

query: What files did I change last week?

description: バグ修正時期の問い合わせ

entries.content: Investigated memory leak in observation-store.ts. SQLite WAL mode causing unbounded growth on high write load.
Fixed memory leak: added checkpoint interval every 1000 writes. WAL file now stays under 50MB. Deployed to staging.
Memory leak fix deployed to production. Monitoring shows WAL size stable at 30-40MB under normal load.

query: When was the memory leak bug fixed?

description: CI失敗原因の問い合わせ

entries.content: CI pipeline passing on main branch. All 1278 tests green. Build time: 2m 34s.
CI failed on PR #142. Error: Cannot find module 'bun:sqlite' in test environment. Node.js runner used instead of Bun.
Fixed CI: switched test runner back to Bun in .github/workflows/test.yml. PR #142 now passing.

query: Why did CI fail recently?

description: 設計判断の問い合わせ

entries.content: Considered using PostgreSQL for better full-text search. Decided against it: SQLite sufficient for single-user local deployment. Avoid operational complexity.
Implemented vector embeddings using 64-dimensional space instead of 384-dim. Trade-off: lower quality vs 6x faster indexing. Acceptable for MVP.
Architecture decision: keep all storage in SQLite with FTS5 + vector extension. No external dependencies for core functionality.

query: Why did we choose SQLite over PostgreSQL?

description: 最新設定値の問い合わせ

entries.content: Default embedding dimension set to 128. Performance tests show 128-dim gives good recall@10 for typical query lengths.
Reduced embedding dimension to 64 after benchmarks. 64-dim achieves 94% of 128-dim recall at 40% lower latency. Updated config default.

query: What is the current embedding dimension?

description: パフォーマンス問題の調査

entries.content: Profiled search latency. p50=45ms, p95=320ms, p99=890ms. High variance on queries with many results.
Root cause: reranker BM25 calculation running O(n^2) for large result sets. Implemented batch scoring to reduce to O(n log n).
After optimization: p50=22ms, p95=85ms, p99=210ms. 4x improvement at p95. Deployed to production.

query: What was causing the high search latency?

description: 依存関係バージョンの問い合わせ

entries.content: Using Bun 1.2.0 as runtime. Upgraded from 1.1.38. New features: improved SQLite performance, better TypeScript support.
Upgraded Bun to 1.3.6 to fix crash in test runner on macOS Silicon. No breaking changes in our usage.

query: What version of Bun are we using?

description: 未解決のTODO追跡

entries.content: TODO: implement query result caching to reduce repeated embedding computations. Estimated 30% latency improvement.
TODO: add streaming response support for MCP server. Currently buffers all results before sending.
TODO caching: deprioritized. Cache invalidation complexity too high given frequent writes. Will revisit in §35.

query: What TODOs are still open?

description: デプロイ時刻の問い合わせ

entries.content: Released v0.2.0. Changes: bilingual search, freshness routing, 50-case knowledge-update benchmark.
Released v0.3.0. Major changes: §32 benchmark CI, temporal ordering, Bootstrap CI implementation.

query: When was v0.3.0 released?

description: テスト失敗の原因追跡

entries.content: Test suite: reranker quality gate failing. Expected recall >= 0.85, actual 0.72. Regression from PR #138.
Root cause of recall regression: PR #138 changed BM25 title weight from 5.0 to 2.0 without updating test baseline. Baseline updated.
Reranker quality gate passing after baseline update. recall=0.91, mrr=0.88. PR #138 approved.

query: Why was the reranker quality gate failing?

description: 担当者の変更

entries.content: Search module owned by Alice. She implemented the original vector retrieval pipeline in §28.
Alice on leave. Bob taking over search module ownership. Onboarding session completed.

query: Who owns the search module now?

description: APIエンドポイントの仕様変更

entries.content: Search API: POST /search accepts {query, limit, project}. Returns up to 10 results by default.
Updated search API: added include_private and sector parameters. Default limit increased to 20. Breaking change: old clients may receive more results.

query: What parameters does the search API accept?

description: 直近のスプリント目標

entries.content: Sprint §33 goal: improve search quality. F1 target: 0.27. Freshness target: 0.80.
Sprint §33 completed. F1=0.287 (target met). Freshness=0.88 (target met, but train=test bias suspected).
Sprint §34 goal: fix measurement reliability. Fix temporal fixture (ASC-only score < 0.7). Fix freshness CV bias.

query: What is the current sprint goal?

description: コードレビューコメントの追跡

entries.content: PR #145 review: suggestion to add error handling in appendQueryLog. Currently silently ignores write errors.
PR #145 review: alternative suggestion - use structured logging instead of raw JSONL. Easier to query.
PR #145 merged. Kept JSONL format (simpler, no deps). Error handling: catch and ignore (log failures must not impact search).

query: What was decided about error handling in the query log?

description: 環境変数の仕様問い合わせ

entries.content: Environment variables: HARNESS_MEM_DECAY_DISABLED=1 disables time-based score decay. HARNESS_MEM_RERANKER_ENABLED=1 enables BM25 reranking.
Added new env vars: HARNESS_BENCH_FRESHNESS_GATE (default 0.30), HARNESS_BENCH_TEMPORAL_GATE (default 0.50). Override CI thresholds.
Added HARNESS_MEM_QUERY_LOG env var. Set to file path to enable JSONL query logging. Privacy: only category/length recorded, not full query text.

query: How do I enable query logging?

description: 実装方針の変更追跡

entries.content: Initial plan: implement Graph traversal for multi-hop reasoning. Estimated 2 sprint effort.
Graph traversal de-prioritized. F1 improvement from vector search alone sufficient for §33 goals. Revisit in §35.
§34 scope confirmed: no graph traversal. Focus on measurement reliability only. Graph traversal remains §35+ scope.

query: Why was Graph traversal de-prioritized?

description: スコア改善の定量追跡

entries.content: §31 F1 score: 0.179. Baseline established with locomo-120 dataset.
§32 F1 score: 0.212. Improvement: +0.033 from BM25 reranking and freshness routing.
§33 F1 score: 0.287. Improvement: +0.075 from temporal ordering and improved answer normalization.

query: What is the latest F1 score?

description: ミーティング決定事項の追跡

entries.content: Team meeting 2026-02-20: discussed LLM judge evaluation. Cost: ~$50/run. Reproducibility concerns due to model updates.
Decision from meeting: skip LLM judge for now. Use automated metrics (F1, Recall, Temporal Order Score) only. Revisit if automated metrics plateau.

query: Why did we decide not to use LLM judge evaluation?

description: テストカバレッジ変化の追跡

entries.content: Test count: 956 tests across 142 files after §32. Coverage added for temporal ordering and Bootstrap CI.
Test count: 1278 tests across 167 files after §33. New tests: bilingual recall, freshness CV, Holm-Bonferroni correction.
Test count: 1343 tests across 172 files after §34 Phase A-B. New tests: temporal-100, knowledge-update-100, 3-layer CI gate.

query: How many tests are there currently?

description: 次のマイルストーンの確認

entries.content: §34 milestone: fix measurement reliability. 4 metrics must have Bootstrap CI. Temporal fixture must have reverse-order cases.
§34 completion criteria: Temporal Weighted Kendall tau >= 0.70 (CI lower bound). Freshness@K >= 0.70 (post-CV). bilingual recall >= 0.85 (N=50).
§35 scope preview: multi-hop reasoning (Graph traversal), 384-dim embeddings, LoCoMo 200-sample expansion. Start after §34 completion.

query: What comes after §34 is complete?
